description: Experienced cabinet installer replacing hinges on an existing kitchen remodel

expected_result.explanation: Blum CLIP top BLUMOTION 110° full overlay with 0mm cruciform plate. 16mm overlay within plate range (14-20mm). 2 hinges for 720mm door height, total capacity 15kg > 5.2kg door weight.

description: Cabinet maker building corner cabinet with bi-fold doors requiring wide opening

expected_result.explanation: Corner cabinet requires >= 155° opening. Blum 155° BLUMOTION or Grass Tiomos 160° both valid. Weight check: 4.0kg door, derated capacity (wide angle) = 5.0 * 0.75 * 2 = 7.5kg — passes.

description: Homeowner renovating kitchen, knows cabinet dimensions but not hinge terminology

conversation_flow.agent: What type of project are you working on?
conversation_flow.user: I'm replacing the doors on my kitchen cabinets

conversation_flow.agent: Are the cabinets frameless (European-style, doors cover the full box) or face-frame (have a visible wood frame around the opening)?
conversation_flow.user: I think they're the European style, no frame visible

conversation_flow.agent: What are your door dimensions? I need the height, width, and thickness.
conversation_flow.user: About 28 inches tall, 18 inches wide, and 3/4 inch thick

conversation_flow.agent: How much of the cabinet side do you want the door to cover? Full overlay covers most of the cabinet box, half overlay splits the space between two doors.
conversation_flow.user: Full overlay I think, each door covers the whole side

conversation_flow.agent: Would you like soft-close hinges? They prevent doors from slamming.
Are any of these corner cabinets or standard?

expected_result.explanation: Converted imperial measurements. Standard frameless full overlay with soft-close. Multiple brand options available — Blum, Grass Tiomos, or Hafele Duomatic all satisfy constraints.

description: Contractor needing inset hinges for face-frame bathroom vanity

expected_result.notes: Face frame inset application. Limited options — must use face-frame-specific plate and hinge combination. Note: Blum face-frame CLIP top at 107° opening.

description: Tall pantry door requiring extra hinges for weight and height

expected_result.explanation: 1600mm door height requires 4 hinges (rule R008). Grass Tiomos 110° has 9.0kg per hinge, 4 hinges = 36kg capacity > 14kg door. 22mm door within 16-24mm range.

description: Constraint violation scenario — door too heavy for wide-angle hinge

expected_result.reason: Corner cabinet requires >= 155° hinge (R013). Blum 155° BLUMOTION (79B3550) has 5.0kg max, derated to 3.75kg for wide angle (R010). 2 hinges = 7.5kg capacity < 12kg door weight. FAILS R007.
expected_result.suggested_resolution: Use 3 hinges (non-standard for 900mm door) bringing capacity to 11.25kg — still insufficient. Consider Grass Tiomos 160° with 3 hinges: 5.0 * 0.75 * 3 = 11.25kg — still fails. Recommend lighter door material or standard cabinet position to allow 110° hinge with higher weight rating.

description: Adjacent doors on shared partition — overlay clearance check

expected_result.explanation: Half overlay, 6mm each side. Combined overlay 6+6=12mm < 19mm partition (R012 passes). 3mm plate gives overlay range 0-6mm — 6mm is at the edge of range. Alternatively, 0mm plate with 3-9mm range also works.
